special_mechanics.name: rock_throwing
special_mechanics.description: Chuck can pick up and throw rocks and boulders at enemies and objects. Rocks can shield from falling hazards; boulders serve as platforms.

special_mechanics.name: belly_thrust_attack
special_mechanics.description: Chuck attacks enemies by thrusting his beer belly while on ground

special_mechanics.name: kick_attack
special_mechanics.description: Chuck can kick while above ground

special_mechanics.name: riding_mechanics
special_mechanics.description: Chuck can ride brontosaurus and bounce on crocodile seesaws for traversal

special_mechanics.name: eating_mechanic
special_mechanics.description: Chuck eats flying lizards and consumes food

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. Sources provide game mechanics and design philosophy but no precise movement physics parameters. Game emphasizes puzzle-platforming with interactive objects and environmental traversal over precision movement mechanics.
